description_long: This shotgun features a robust, elongated design with a dark metallic double-barrel assembly and a wooden stock. The barrels are parallel and reinforced with metallic bands, giving the weapon a sturdy and tactical appearance. The stock is full-sized and crafted from wood, providing ergonomic support for the user. A prominent pump mechanism is visible beneath the barrels, along with a pistol-style foregrip for enhanced handling. The trigger guard is rounded and moderately sized, offering protection and easy access to the trigger. The overall finish combines matte black metal with polished wood, creating a visually striking and functional firearm.
description: A double-barrel shotgun with a wooden full stock, metallic pump, and pistol-style foregrip, featuring a matte black and wood finish.
description_view_0: Front view showing the twin barrels and the alignment of the pump and foregrip.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the full wooden stock, double barrels, pump mechanism, and trigger guard.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the end of the stock and the symmetry of the barrels and receiver.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the same features as view 1, with clear visibility of the pump and stock details.
attribute_barrel_configuration: side-by-side double-barrel with parallel alignment and metallic reinforcement bands
attribute_trigger_guard_design: rounded, medium-sized trigger guard with a smooth contour and no visible finger grooves
